name: Red Rock Resorts, Inc.
business: Red Rock Resorts, Inc. owns and operates gaming and entertainment properties in the Las Vegas valley, offering casino gaming, hotel accommodations, dining, and other amenities primarily to local residents and visitors.

exposures.sentence: Our principal source of revenue and operating income is gaming.

catalysts.sentence: We currently estimate that the North Fork Project will be completed and opened for business in the fourth quarter of 2026.
